queries.name: top_states
queries.query: StormEvents | summarize count() by State | top 10 by count_

queries.name: event_types
queries.query: StormEvents | summarize count() by EventType | order by count_ desc | take 20

queries.name: injuries_by_state
queries.query: StormEvents | summarize TotalInjuries=sum(InjuriesDirect) by State | top 10 by TotalInjuries
